mapper.sql: id, work_date, company, department, position, content, hours, project, remark, is_rest, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_record (work_date, company, department, position, content, hours, project, remark, is_rest, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{workDate}, #{company}, #{department}, #{position}, #{content}, #{hours}, #{project}, #{remark}, #{isRest}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO work_record (work_date, company, department, position, content, hours, project, remark, is_rest, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{r.workDate}, #{r.company}, #{r.department}, #{r.position}, #{r.content}, #{r.hours}, #{r.project}, #{r.remark}, #{r.isRest}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE work_record SET work_date = #{workDate}, company = #{company}, department = #{department}, position = #{position}, content = #{content}, hours = #{hours}, project = #{project}, remark = #{remark}, is_rest = #{isRest}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM work_record WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM work_record ORDER BY work_date DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT FROM work_record WHERE work_date >= CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01') AND work_date < CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01') + INTERVAL 1 MONTH ORDER BY work_date DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT FROM work_record WHERE work_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} ORDER BY work_date DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM work_record WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT project AS `name`, SUM(hours) AS totalHours FROM work_record WHERE work_date >= CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01') AND work_date < CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01') + INTERVAL 1 MONTH GROUP BY project ORDER BY totalHours DESC

SELECT company AS `name`, SUM(hours) AS totalHours FROM work_record WHERE work_date >= CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01') AND work_date < CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01') + INTERVAL 1 MONTH GROUP BY company ORDER BY totalHours DESC

SELECT department AS `name`, SUM(hours) AS totalHours FROM work_record WHERE work_date >= CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01') AND work_date < CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01') + INTERVAL 1 MONTH GROUP BY department ORDER BY totalHours DESC

SELECT position AS `name`, SUM(hours) AS totalHours FROM work_record WHERE work_date >= CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01') AND work_date < CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01') + INTERVAL 1 MONTH GROUP BY position ORDER BY totalHours DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(hours), 0) FROM work_record WHERE work_date >= CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01') AND work_date < CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01') + INTERVAL 1 MONTH
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM work_record WHERE work_date >= CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01') AND work_date < CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01') + INTERVAL 1 MONTH
SELECT DISTINCT project FROM work_record WHERE project IS NOT NULL AND project != '' ORDER BY project
SELECT DISTINCT company FROM work_record WHERE company IS NOT NULL AND company != '' ORDER BY company
SELECT DISTINCT department FROM work_record WHERE department IS NOT NULL AND department != '' ORDER BY department
SELECT DISTINCT position FROM work_record WHERE position IS NOT NULL AND position != '' ORDER BY position
